message:
feat(extensions-js): substantially improve node:util polyfill fidelity

Upgrade the embedded node:util virtual module to handle real-world
extension code that depends on Node.js util semantics:

inspect(): Rewritten with depth-aware recursive formatter supporting
  objects, arrays, Date, RegExp, Error, circular reference detection,
  and configurable depth option — replaces naive JSON.stringify fallback.

format(): Full %s/%d/%f/%i/%j/%o/%O specifier support with overflow
  argument handling, matching Node.js util.format() behaviour.

deprecate(): Now emits a one-time DeprecationWarning to stderr on
  first call instead of being a silent passthrough.

debuglog(): Respects NODE_DEBUG env var to selectively enable debug
  sections, matching Node.js convention.

callbackify(): New export wrapping async functions as callback-style.

types: Expanded from 2 to 16 type-check predicates (isDate, isRegExp,
  isNativeError, isSet, isMap, isTypedArray, isArrayBuffer, isDataView,
  isGeneratorFunction, isGeneratorObject, isBooleanObject, isNumberObject,
  isStringObject, isWeakMap, isWeakSet) — matches Node.js util.types API.

isAsyncFunction(): Fixed to actually detect async functions via
  constructor name rather than always returning false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
